import weakref

class Cache:
    def __init__(self):
        self._refs = []

    def add(self, obj):
        ref = weakref.ref(obj)
        self._refs.append(ref)

    def get_all(self):
        return [ref() for ref in self._refs]

    def process_all(self):
        for ref in self._refs:
            obj = ref()
            obj.process()

    def find_by_name(self, name: str):
        for ref in self._refs:
            obj = ref()
            if obj.name == name:
                return obj
        return None

    def summary(self):
        names = [ref().name for ref in self._refs]
        return ", ".join(names)
